title: Constructed Pylon roll four destroys itself

card.rawText: Play this card to your side of the field. This card fills 3 empty Infinite magic slots on your opponents side of the field. On your turn your opponent may roll 1 die, if 4-6 destroy this card.

effect.value: Play this card to your side of the field. This card fills 3 empty Infinite magic slots on your opponents side of the field. On your turn your opponent may roll 1 die, if 4-6 destroy this card.
